title: Eleven: Table Tennis VR
notes: Completely freezes immediately after starting and must be killed.
Seems stable - but menu text is invisible. It's possible to get a game going, though. Performance is fine.
title: Eleven: Table Tennis VR

notes:
the game seems to work very fine and very playable (amazing physics), but the controllers disappear when you enter the steam menu and go back to the game. there doesn't seem to be a way to get them back and you have to close the game.
haven't tried any tweaks
title: Eleven: Table Tennis VR

notes: Works perfectly for single player. Multiplayer not tested. It did crash a couple of times but that was over a few hours of game play and restarting was fairly quick. I did experience some framerate issues with the winter location when looking around to the left but gameplay was pretty smooth.
